case_title: SULEIMA CATALINA DELEON COOK VS. KELLY JEAN GIBSON HUGHS ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,000.00 FILED BY DELEON COOK, SULEIMA CATALINA AS TO DEFENDANT GIBSON HUGHS, KELLY JEAN MUELLER, RALPH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-23-2022 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00); REMARKS: BAD ADDRESS. UNABLE TO LOCATE ADDRESS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF DELEON COOK, SULEIMA CATALINA AS TO DEFENDANT MUELLER, RALPH

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-23-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-24-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SULEIMA CATALINA DELEON COOK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KELLY JEAN GIBSON HUGHS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DOES NOT WAIVE SERVICE. DEFENDANT PROVIDES ADDRESS INFORMATION AS TO WHERE SHE CAN BE PROPERLY SERVED BY THE PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT HAS BEEN MADE AWARE OF THE CONTINUANCE DATE BY VERBAL NOTICE. DEFENDANT RALPH MUELLER IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-24-2023 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAR-28-2023 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF SULEIMA CATALINA DELEON COOK IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT KELLY JEAN GIBSON HUGHS IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT RALPH MUELLER IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF NOT KNOWING WHAT IS PROOF OF SERVICE. REFERRED TO ACCESS CENTER FOR QUESTIONS REGARDING PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MURLENE J. RANDLE; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROGRESS REPORT

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
